rationale: The proposed change concerns the residence homestead exemption under Tax Code §11.13(b). Educ. Code §38.017 governs availability of automated externaldefibrillators at school campuses. The two provisions address entirely unrelated subjects and share no operative dependency.
quote: Each school district shall make available at each campus in the district at least one automated external defibrillator, as defined by Section 779.001, Health and Safety Code.
_note: No conflict; rule_text is unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change.
